title: Nextvibe Backend
description: Full backend infrastructure for a social event platform. 11 modules, REST API with Swagger docs, deployed on Render with Aiven PostgreSQL and Redis.

title: Autonomous Robot Navigation
description: Vision-based autonomous robot navigation system using TurtleBot3, Gazebo simulation, and OpenCV HSV color segmentation for real-time path detection.

title: YOLOv8 Object Detection Pipeline
description: Real-time object detection pipeline integrated with ROS2 Jazzy. Uses YOLOv8 for detection and publishes results to ROS2 topics for downstream processing.
